trisk.analysis 1.2.3
  • Reference
    • 1. Getting started
    • 2. Bank portfolio analysis — start here
    • 3. Inputs and outputs
    • 4. Run on a portfolio
    • 5. Sensitivity analysis (bank-impact view)
    • 6. PD & EL integration

Package index

Run TRISK

Entry points that execute the TRISK model — on raw inputs, on a portfolio, or across a grid of parameter sets for sensitivity analysis.

run_trisk_model
run_trisk_model
run_trisk_on_portfolio()
Run TRISK Model on Portfolio
run_trisk_on_simple_portfolio()
Run TRISK Model on Simple Portfolio
run_trisk_sa()
Run TRISK sensitivity analysis on multiple scenarios
run_trisk_agg()
Run TRISK Model with Aggregated Results
run_trisk_from_db()
Fetch Data from PostgreSQL and Run Transition Risk Aggregation

Inputs and parameters

Scaffold a local input folder, download bundled inputs, list available scenario parameters, and match companies.

setup_trisk_inputs()
Scaffold a local TRISK input-data folder
download_trisk_inputs()
Download TRISK input data files from a specified endpoint
get_available_parameters()
Get the possible parameters values for Trisk from the scenario data
fuzzy_match_company_ids()
Fuzzy Match Company IDs

Portfolio metrics and checks

Validate a portfolio, join it to TRISK outputs, and compute exposure metrics.

check_portfolio()
Check Portfolio and Match Company IDs
check_portfolio_simple()
Check Simple Portfolio
compute_analysis_metrics()
Compute Analysis Metrics
compute_simple_portfolio_metrics()
Compute value-change and expected-loss metrics on exposure shares
add_exposure_share_from_npv()
Compute exposure shares from baseline NPV
join_trisk_outputs_to_portfolio()
Join TRISK Outputs to Portfolio
join_simple_portfolio_to_trisk()
Join simple portfolio to aggregated TRISK outputs

Aggregation

Roll up firm-level facts to portfolio and sector aggregates.

aggregate_el_integration()
Aggregate EL integration results to portfolio level
aggregate_pd_integration()
Aggregate PD integration results to EAD-weighted portfolio level
aggregate_simple_portfolio()
Aggregate simple portfolio input rows
aggregate_simple_portfolio_results()
Aggregate simple portfolio tech details back to input-row shape
aggregate_trajectories_facts()
Aggregate numerical trajectories columns
aggregate_trisk_outputs_simple()
Aggregate TRISK outputs for simple portfolio analysis

PD and EL integration

Recombine TRISK shock PDs with the bank’s internal PDs and translate to expected loss.

integrate_pd()
Integrate TRISK PD shift into an internal PD estimate
integrate_el()
Integrate TRISK EL shift into an internal EL estimate

Plots and KPI tables

Visualisations and summary tables for PD, EL, NPV, and exposure results.

pipeline_crispy_pd_integration_bars()
PD integration bar plot (4-bar grouped)
pipeline_crispy_pd_method_comparison()
PD Integration Method Comparison Plot
pipeline_crispy_pd_waterfall()
PD waterfall plot
pipeline_crispy_pd_term_plot()
Visualize PD Values by Term and Business Unit
pipeline_crispy_pd_kpi_table()
PD Integration KPI Table
pipeline_crispy_el_adjustment_bars()
EL Adjustment Bar Plot (horizontal, sign-filled)
pipeline_crispy_el_kpi_table()
EL Integration KPI Table
pipeline_crispy_el_sector_breakdown_table()
EL Sector Breakdown Table
pipeline_crispy_expected_loss_plot()
Financial Risk Visualization via Expected Loss and Exposure Plot
pipeline_crispy_exposure_change_plot()
Visualize Exposure and Value Loss Changes
pipeline_crispy_npv_change_plot()
Visualize Sector-wise NPV Percentage Changes
plot_multi_trajectories()
Visualize Trajectory Risks Over Time by Business Unit and Sector

Plot styling

Shared theme and palette used across the package plots.

TRISK_PLOT_THEME_FUNC()
TRISK plot theme
TRISK_HEX_RED TRISK_HEX_GREEN TRISK_HEX_GREY TRISK_HEX_ADJUSTED STATUS_GREEN
TRISK plot palette constants

On this page
